title: Memory oversubscription: node01 at 145% utilisation
summary: Jobs 990001 and 990002 are both running on node01. Combined requested memory: 380GB on a 256GB node. node01 memory utilisation at 145%. Swap I/O causing both jobs to run 3–4× slower than expected.
notes: SLURM memory enforcement was bypassed — investigate MaxMemPerNode setting.
